images.title: Mountain Bluebird
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-1MarkII, OM 150-400mm F4.5 TC
images.field_notes: The electric blue plumage of the Western Bluebird is always striking to see, especially in contrast to the neutrals of the dunes.

images.title: The Cantilever's Edge
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-3, OLYMPUS M.75mm F1.8

images.title: The Adjacent Edge

images.title: IMG_0397

images.title: Swallow Swallowing a Swallow
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-1MarkII, OM 150-400mm F4.5 TC + MC-14
images.field_notes: Watching the swallows play by the pond, one was spotted still on the branches in the middle. After focusing in on it, the mother came by to feed her young in the right place, right time scenario.

images.title: Baltimore Oriole
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-1MarkII, OM 150-400mm F4.5 TC
images.field_notes: The bright colors of the Baltimore Oriole is always such a delight. The perfect contrast from the orange of the feathers to the blue sky is perfect.
